Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Alan W. Sparer, Esq. & David R. Lawson, Esq. 434-1600 for pltf & opposing party; Dorothy L. Fernandez, Esq. & Jordan Eth, Esq. 268-7000 for defts & moving parties Bessemer Trust Company and Robert G. Vanneman.
RULING: This matter was heard at the same time with case no. 401907 on Dept. 301's calendar. Argued and the Court granted the motion to strike punitives with leave to amend. 20 days leave to amend. Deft to prepare order.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Alan W. Sparer, Esq. & David R. Lawson, Esq. 434-1600 for pltf & opposing party; Dorothy L. Fernandez, Esq. & Jordan Eth, Esq. 268-7000 for defts & moving parties Bessemer Trust Company and Robert G. Vanneman.
RULING: This matter was heard at the same time with case no. 401907 on Dept. 301's calendar. Argued and the Court overruled the demurrer as to the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd causes of action; 4th cause of action breach of oral contract sustained with leave to amend as to Vanneman; 5th cause of action B&P17200 sustained as to Vanneman and overruled as to the business entity; 6th cause of action (CLRA) sustained with leave to amend. 20 days leave to amend. Deft to prepare order.
